subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God, Who hath sent down the verses and manifested the clear proofs, and hath sent forth the Messengers, making them guides unto His paths [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی انزل الایات و اظهر البینات و ارسل الرسل و جعلهم هداه السبل من عنده
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @praise and encouragement, @goodly deeds; actions, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity
